headerTitle: Applied AI Engineer  ·  Agentic Workflow Systems  ·  Forward-Deployed AI Builder  ·  Business Automation
subjectText: Applied AI Engineer — Foley (Remote US, EST) · $80K–$130K
intro: Foley is going AI-native by rethinking how work gets done from the inside. The Applied AI Engineer embeds with business teams, identifies high-leverage problems, and ships real solutions — six times completed across eight industries.
bullets: Forward-deployed AI builder — six complete cycles: embed with operational teams, identify highest-friction points, ship AI-powered systems, measure in business terms. Eight industries, same execution model each time.

Agentic workflow systems in production — 14 live AI endpoints using Claude and GPT-4o with multi-model routing, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, Zod-validated output, and webhook-driven automation pipelines equivalent to n8n/Make/Zapier.

Backend engineering at production quality — TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM across 13 platforms and 100+ API routes. AI integration and backend infrastructure ship together as one system.
closingLine: Available immediately. Remote US, EST hours workable from TX.
matchNotes: Exact role description match: forward-deployed AI builder embedded with business teams. Agentic workflow + production engineering stack = direct match. $80-130K is low relative to pipeline but role is high match and remote US. EST hours workable from TX.
